Delicious Dining: The traditional restaurant offers a continental or buffet breakfast, Italian dinner, and vegetarian, gluten-free, and dairy-free options. Outdoor seating and barbecue facilities enhance the dining experience.

Hotel Miramonti Seulo offre una piscina allГұв‚¬в„ұaperto stagionale, un giardino, una sala comune e una terrazza a SeГѓВ№lo. hotels.name: Hotel Anticos Palathos
hotels.description_fr:
Occupant un ancien palais, l'Hotel Anticos Palathos est situГѓВ© sur la place centrale d'Orosei, sur la cГѓВөte orientale de Sardaigne, prГѓВЁs de l'oasis de Bidderosa et ГѓВ  proximitГѓВ© de plages s'ГѓВ©tendant sur plus de 20 km.
Modernes et spacieuses, les chambres ainsi que les suites comportent la climatisation, du carrelage traditionnel et des plafonds au dГѓВ©cor unique.
Le petit-dГѓВ©jeuner se compose d'un buffet variГѓВ© ainsi que de boissons chaudes. Les restaurants et les pizzerias les plus proches se trouvent ГѓВ  50 mГѓВЁtres.
Vous bГѓВ©nГѓВ©ficierez gratuitement d'une borne Internet ГѓВ  la rГѓВ©ception ainsi que d'une connexion Wi-Fi dans l'ensemble des locaux. Le personnel se fera un plaisir de vous fournir des informations sur les visites guidГѓВ©es, les balades en bateau et les excursions.
hotels.description_en:
Hotel Anticos Palathos is located in an ancient palace in the central square of Orosei. It is on the east coast of Sardinia, close to the Bidderosa Oasis. The nearby beaches stretch for more than 20 km.
The hotel provides modern and spacious rooms and suites. All accommodation includes air conditioning, traditional tiled floors, and unique, decorated ceilings.
Breakfast consists of a varied buffet together with hot drinks. The nearest restaurants and pizzerias are 50 metres away.
The property has a free internet point at reception, and WiFi is free throughout. Staff are available to provide information about guided tours, boat trips and excursions.
Guests can also rent a car or book a shuttle service to the nearest airports.
Couples particularly like the location Гұв‚¬вЂқ they rated it 9.
